Who We Are

Your Complete School & Printing Partner

Vijayshree Enterprises is a trusted name in school supplies and printing services. We provide end-to-end solutions — from recognition products like trophies, medals, and mementos, to essential items like ID cards and badges, to large-format printing like flex and banners. We also run a fully equipped printing press for bulk and custom orders.

  • 🏅
    Premium Quality Products Every trophy, medal, and certificate is crafted with precision. We never compromise on finish or material quality.
  • 🖨️
    In-House Printing Press Our own press ensures faster delivery, tighter quality control, and competitive pricing for bulk orders.
  • 🎓
    Schools, Colleges & Events Trusted by hundreds of schools, coaching institutes and event organizers for their supply needs.
  • 💼
    Customisation at Scale All products can be tailored — your school logo, colours, and details on every item.
📞 Call Now View Services
What We Offer

Our Products & Services

From recognition to print — we supply everything schools and institutions need, all under one roof.

🏆
Trophies & Awards
Custom trophies for sports events, academics and competitions. Available in various sizes and finishes.
Customisable
🥇
Medals
High-quality gold, silver and bronze medals for all types of events. Bulk orders welcome with custom engraving.
Bulk Available
🎁
Mementos
Unique, branded mementos for farewell events, staff recognition, and annual day ceremonies.
Branded
🪪
ID Cards
Durable PVC and laminated ID cards for students, staff and events. Custom design included.
PVC & Laminated
📛
School Batches / Badges
Fabric, metal or plastic badges for students, prefects and school events — with your school emblem.
All Varieties
🖼️
Flex Printing
High-resolution flex printing for school boards, notice boards, and outdoor display. UV-resistant inks.
High Resolution
🚩
Banner Printing
Eye-catching banners for events, annual days, sports meets and campus promotions — any size.
Any Size
📜
Certificates Printing
Professional achievement, participation and merit certificates — custom designed or from our templates.
Custom Design
🎒
Customized School Materials
Notebooks, stationery, diary, planners and other materials branded with your school's identity.
Full Range

Why Schools Trust Vijayshree
